metadata.title: MD7X-00-003600 - MongoDB must uniquely identify and authenticate organizational users.
metadata.description: Checks that authenticationMechanisms in mongod.conf includes at least one strong authentication mechanism: SCRAM-SHA-256, SCRAM-SHA-512, MONGODB-X509, GSSAPI, or PLAIN. This ensures individual accounts are uniquely authenticated rather than sharing anonymous or unauthenticated access.

criterion.comment: authenticationMechanisms includes at least one strong mechanism

ind:textfilecontent54_test.comment: authenticationMechanisms includes a strong authentication mechanism
